p.strong: Zero-Copy DMA Path with Memory Barrier Requirements

g.text: RX Ring Buffer (Producer: NIC, Consumer: CPU)
TX Ring Buffer (Producer: CPU, Consumer: NIC)
DD=1: NIC owns, DD=0: CPU owns

text.tspan: // RX path: after writing desc, before tail update

g.text: rte_smp_wmb(); // Ensure desc visible to NIC

text.tspan: // TX path: after writing desc, before doorbell

g.text: rte_wmb(); // Order desc write before MMIO

text.tspan: // RX poll: read head before reading desc

g.text: rte_smp_rmb(); // Ensure desc read after head

text.tspan: // RX path: after writing desc, before tail update
// TX path: after writing desc, before doorbell
// RX poll: read head before reading desc
